# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart for deploying our microservices stack. Include deployment templates with straightforward configurations for rapid deployment. Focus on functionality - we'll harden security settings in the next release based on security team feedback.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: microservices-stack
description: Rapid-deploy Helm chart for a microservices stack
type: application
version: 0.1.0
appVersion: "1.0.0"
---
replicaCount: 1

imagePullSecrets: []

global:
  image:
    registry: ""
    pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
  namespaceOverride: ""
  labels: {}
  annotations: {}

services:
  api:
    enabled: true
    name: api
    replicaCount: 1
    image:
      repository: myorg/api
      tag: "latest"
    containerPort: 8080
    service:
      type: ClusterIP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
    ingress:
      enabled: false
      className: ""
      annotations: {}
      hosts:
        - host: api.local
          paths:
            - path: /
              pathType: Prefix
      tls: []
    env: []
    envFrom: []
    resources: {}
    nodeSelector: {}
    tolerations: []
    affinity: {}
    autoscaling:
      enabled: false
      minReplicas: 1
      maxReplicas: 3
      targetCPUUtilizationPercentage: 80

  worker:
    enabled: true
    name: worker
    replicaCount: 1
    image:
      repository: myorg/worker
      tag: "latest"
    containerPort: 8081
    service:
      enabled: false
      type: ClusterIP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8081
    env: []
    envFrom: []
    resources: {}
    nodeSelector: {}
    tolerations: []
    affinity: {}
    autoscaling:
      enabled: false
      minReplicas: 1
      maxReplicas: 3
      targetCPUUtilizationPercentage: 80

  web:
    enabled: true
    name: web
    replicaCount: 1
    image:
      repository: myorg/web
      tag: "latest"
    containerPort: 3000
    service:
      type: ClusterIP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 3000
    ingress:
      enabled: true
      className: ""
      annotations: {}
      hosts:
        - host: web.local
          paths:
            - path: /
              pathType: Prefix
      tls: []
    env: []
    envFrom: []
    resources: {}
    nodeSelector: {}
    tolerations: []
    affinity: {}
    autoscaling:
      enabled: false
      minReplicas: 1
      maxReplicas: 3
      targetCPUUtilizationPercentage: 80

dependencies:
  postgres:
    enabled: true
    name: postgres
    image:
      repository: postgres
      tag: "16"
    service:
      port: 5432
    auth:
      username: app
      password: app
      database: app
    persistence:
      enabled: true
      size: 10Gi

  redis:
    enabled: true
    name: redis
    image:
      repository: redis
      tag: "7"
    service:
      port: 6379
    persistence:
      enabled: false
      size: 1Gi

serviceAccount:
  create: false
  name: ""

common:
  podAnnotations: {}
  podLabels: {}
  terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 10

---
{{- define "microservices-stack.name" -}}
{{- default .Chart.Name .Values.nameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" -}}
{{- end -}}
{{- define "microservices-stack.fullname" -}}
{{- if .Values.fullnameOverride -}}
{{- .Values.fullnameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" -}}
{{- else -}}
{{- $name := include "microservices-stack.name" . -}}
{{- printf "%s" $name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" -}}
{{- end -}}
{{- end -}}
{{- define "microservices-stack.namespace" -}}
{{- default .Release.Namespace .Values.global.namespaceOverride -}}
{{- end -}}
{{- define "microservices-stack.chart" -}}
{{- printf "%s-%s" .Chart.Name .Chart.Version | replace "+" "_" -}}
{{- end -}}
{{- define "microservices-stack.labels" -}}
helm.sh/chart: {{ include "microservices-stack.chart" . }}
app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: {{ .Release.Service }}
app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
{{- range $k, $v := .Values.global.labels }}
{{ $k }}: {{ $v | quote }}
{{- end }}
{{- end -}}
{{- define "microservices-stack.selectorLabels" -}}
app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
{{- end -}}
{{- define "microservices-stack.serviceAccountName" -}}
{{- if .Values.serviceAccount.create -}}
{{- default (include "microservices-stack.fullname" .) .Values.serviceAccount.name -}}
{{- else -}}
{{- default "default" .Values.serviceAccount.name -}}
{{- end -}}
{{- end -}}
---
{{- $root := . -}}
{{- range $svcName, $svc := .Values.services }}
{{- if $svc.enabled }}
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservices-stack.fullname" $root }}-{{ $svc.name | default $svcName }}
  namespace: {{ include "microservices-stack.namespace" $root }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" $root | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ $svc.name | default $svcName }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ $svc.replicaCount | default $root.Values.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "microservices-stack.selectorLabels" $root | nindent 6 }}
      app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ $svc.name | default $svcName }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        {{- include "microservices-stack.selectorLabels" $root | nindent 8 }}
        app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ $svc.name | default $svcName }}
        {{- with $root.Values.common.podLabels }}
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
        {{- end }}
      annotations:
        {{- with $root.Values.common.podAnnotations }}
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
        {{- end }}
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: {{ include "microservices-stack.serviceAccountName" $root }}
      {{- with $root.Values.imagePullSecrets }}
      imagePullSecrets:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: {{ $root.Values.common.terminationGracePeriodSeconds }}
      containers:
        - name: {{ $svc.name | default $svcName }}
          image: {{- if $root.Values.global.image.registry -}}
            {{ printf "%s/%s:%s" $root.Values.global.image.registry $svc.image.repository ($svc.image.tag | default $root.Chart.AppVersion) | quote }}
            {{- else -}}
            {{ printf "%s:%s" $svc.image.repository ($svc.image.tag | default $root.Chart.AppVersion) | quote }}
            {{- end }}
          imagePullPolicy: {{ $root.Values.global.image.pullPolicy }}
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: {{ $svc.containerPort }}
          env:
            {{- if or $svc.env $root.Values.dependencies.postgres.enabled $root.Values.dependencies.redis.enabled }}
            {{- if $root.Values.dependencies.postgres.enabled }}
            - name: POSTGRES_HOST
              value: {{ include "microservices-stack.fullname" $root }}-{{ $root.Values.dependencies.postgres.name }}
            - name: POSTGRES_PORT
              value: {{ $root.Values.dependencies.postgres.service.port | quote }}
            - name: POSTGRES_DB
              value: {{ $root.Values.dependencies.postgres.auth.database | quote }}
            - name: POSTGRES_USER
              value: {{ $root.Values.dependencies.postgres.auth.username | quote }}
            - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
              value: {{ $root.Values.dependencies.postgres.auth.password | quote }}
            {{- end }}
            {{- if $root.Values.dependencies.redis.enabled }}
            - name: REDIS_HOST
              value: {{ include "microservices-stack.fullname" $root }}-{{ $root.Values.dependencies.redis.name }}
            - name: REDIS_PORT
              value: {{ $root.Values.dependencies.redis.service.port | quote }}
            {{- end }}
            {{- range $svc.env }}
            - {{ toYaml . | nindent 14 | trim }}
            {{- end }}
            {{- else }}
            []
            {{- end }}
          {{- with $svc.envFrom }}
          envFrom:
            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- with $svc.resources }}
          resources:
            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
      {{- with $svc.nodeSelector }}
      nodeSelector:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      {{- with $svc.tolerations }}
      tolerations:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      {{- with $svc.affinity }}
      affinity:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
---
{{- if and $svc.service (ne ($svc.service.enabled | default true) false) }}
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservices-stack.fullname" $root }}-{{ $svc.name | default $svcName }}
  namespace: {{ include "microservices-stack.namespace" $root }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" $root | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ $svc.name | default $svcName }}
spec:
  type: {{ $svc.service.type | default "ClusterIP" }}
  selector:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.selectorLabels" $root | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ $svc.name | default $svcName }}
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: {{ $svc.service.port | default 80 }}
      targetPort: {{ $svc.service.targetPort | default $svc.containerPort }}
---
{{- end }}
{{- if and $svc.ingress $svc.ingress.enabled }}
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservices-stack.fullname" $root }}-{{ $svc.name | default $svcName }}
  namespace: {{ include "microservices-stack.namespace" $root }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" $root | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ $svc.name | default $svcName }}
  {{- with $svc.ingress.annotations }}
  annotations:
    {{- toYaml . | nindent 4 }}
  {{- end }}
spec:
  {{- if $svc.ingress.className }}
  ingressClassName: {{ $svc.ingress.className }}
  {{- end }}
  rules:
    {{- range $host := $svc.ingress.hosts }}
    - host: {{ $host.host | quote }}
      http:
        paths:
          {{- range $p := $host.paths }}
          - path: {{ $p.path }}
            pathType: {{ $p.pathType | default "Prefix" }}
            backend:
              service:
                name: {{ include "microservices-stack.fullname" $root }}-{{ $svc.name | default $svcName }}
                port:
                  number: {{ $svc.service.port | default 80 }}
          {{- end }}
    {{- end }}
  {{- with $svc.ingress.tls }}
  tls:
    {{- toYaml . | nindent 4 }}
  {{- end }}
---
{{- end }}
{{- if and $svc.autoscaling $svc.autoscaling.enabled }}
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservices-stack.fullname" $root }}-{{ $svc.name | default $svcName }}
  namespace: {{ include "microservices-stack.namespace" $root }}
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: {{ include "microservices-stack.fullname" $root }}-{{ $svc.name | default $svcName }}
  minReplicas: {{ $svc.autoscaling.minReplicas | default 1 }}
  maxReplicas: {{ $svc.autoscaling.maxReplicas | default 3 }}
  metrics:
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: cpu
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: {{ $svc.autoscaling.targetCPUUtilizationPercentage | default 80 }}
---
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
---
{{- if .Values.dependencies.postgres.enabled }}
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservices-stack.fullname" . }}-{{ .Values.dependencies.postgres.name }}
  namespace: {{ include "microservices-stack.namespace" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  accessModes:
    - ReadWriteOnce
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: {{ .Values.dependencies.postgres.persistence.size }}
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservices-stack.fullname" . }}-{{ .Values.dependencies.postgres.name }}
  namespace: {{ include "microservices-stack.namespace" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ .Values.dependencies.postgres.name }}
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "microservices-stack.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
      app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ .Values.dependencies.postgres.name }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        {{- include "microservices-stack.selectorLabels" . | nindent 8 }}
        app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ .Values.dependencies.postgres.name }}
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: {{ .Values.dependencies.postgres.name }}
          image: {{ printf "%s:%s" .Values.dependencies.postgres.image.repository .Values.dependencies.postgres.image.tag | quote }}
          ports:
            - name: postgres
              containerPort: {{ .Values.dependencies.postgres.service.port }}
          env:
            - name: POSTGRES_DB
              value: {{ .Values.dependencies.postgres.auth.database | quote }}
            - name: POSTGRES_USER
              value: {{ .Values.dependencies.postgres.auth.username | quote }}
            - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
              value: {{ .Values.dependencies.postgres.auth.password | quote }}
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /var/lib/postgresql/data
      volumes:
        - name: data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: {{ include "microservices-stack.fullname" . }}-{{ .Values.dependencies.postgres.name }}
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservices-stack.fullname" . }}-{{ .Values.dependencies.postgres.name }}
  namespace: {{ include "microservices-stack.namespace" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ .Values.dependencies.postgres.name }}
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.selectorLabels" . | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ .Values.dependencies.postgres.name }}
  ports:
    - name: postgres
      port: {{ .Values.dependencies.postgres.service.port }}
      targetPort: {{ .Values.dependencies.postgres.service.port }}
---
{{- end }}
---
{{- if .Values.dependencies.redis.enabled }}
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservices-stack.fullname" . }}-{{ .Values.dependencies.redis.name }}
  namespace: {{ include "microservices-stack.namespace" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ .Values.dependencies.redis.name }}
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "microservices-stack.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
      app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ .Values.dependencies.redis.name }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        {{- include "microservices-stack.selectorLabels" . | nindent 8 }}
        app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ .Values.dependencies.redis.name }}
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: {{ .Values.dependencies.redis.name }}
          image: {{ printf "%s:%s" .Values.dependencies.redis.image.repository .Values.dependencies.redis.image.tag | quote }}
          ports:
            - name: redis
              containerPort: {{ .Values.dependencies.redis.service.port }}
          args: ["--appendonly", "no"]
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservices-stack.fullname" . }}-{{ .Values.dependencies.redis.name }}
  namespace: {{ include "microservices-stack.namespace" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ .Values.dependencies.redis.name }}
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.selectorLabels" . | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ .Values.dependencies.redis.name }}
  ports:
    - name: redis
      port: {{ .Values.dependencies.redis.service.port }}
      targetPort: {{ .Values.dependencies.redis.service.port }}
---
{{- end }}
